# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

import google.cloud.deploymentmanager.v2.resources as res


# Network.
network = res.Network(
  "vpc-network",
    name="vpc-network"
    autoCreateSubnetworks=True,
    subnetMode="AUTO"  # Creates a single subnet.
    description="Creates VPC Network"
)

# Subnets. We are using the 'region' parameter for specifying zone location since we are in regional scope. 
subnet1 = res.Network(
  "vpc-network-subnet-east",
  name="vpc-network-subnet-east",
  region="us-central" # Specifies that the region in which the resource will be created.
  network="$(ref vpc_network)"
)
subnet2 = res.Network(
  "vpc-network-subnet-west",
  name="vpc-network-subnet-west",
  region="europe-north1", # We could also use $(var region) instead of explicitly specifying this, but it is hard to keep this and previous subnets in sync so I am keeping it explicit.
  network="$(ref vpc_network)"
)

# Template to deploy the above resources.
template = res.Template(
    "vpc-with-subnets",
    resources=[network, subnet1, subnet2],
    description="Creates VPC with subnet"
)
